text: Table customers contains columns: CustomerID, Segment, Currency.
Column CustomerID in table customers stores integer data.
Column Segment in table customers stores text data.
Column Currency in table customers stores text data.
Column CustomerID in table customers contains values such as: '3', '5', '6', '7', '9'.
Column Segment in table customers contains values such as: 'SME', 'LAM', 'KAM'.
Column Currency in table customers contains values such as: 'EUR', 'CZK'.
Table gasstations contains columns: GasStationID, ChainID, Country, Segment.
Column GasStationID in table gasstations stores integer data.
Column ChainID in table gasstations stores integer data.
Column Country in table gasstations stores text data.
Column Segment in table gasstations stores text data.
Column GasStationID in table gasstations contains values such as: '44', '45', '46', '47', '48'.
Column ChainID in table gasstations contains values such as: '13', '6', '23', '33', '4'.
Column Country in table gasstations contains values such as: 'CZE', 'SVK'.
Column Segment in table gasstations contains values such as: 'Value for money', 'Premium', 'Other', 'Noname', 'Discount'.
Table products contains columns: ProductID, Description.
Column ProductID in table products stores integer data.
Column Description in table products stores text data.
Column ProductID in table products contains values such as: '1', '2', '3', '4', '5'.
Column Description in table products contains values such as: 'Rucní zadání', 'Nafta', 'Special', 'Super', 'Natural'.
Table sqlite_sequence contains columns: name, seq.
Column name in table sqlite_sequence stores text data.
Column seq in table sqlite_sequence stores text data.
Column name in table sqlite_sequence contains values such as: 'transactions_1k'.
Column seq in table sqlite_sequence contains values such as: '1000'.
Table transactions_1k contains columns: TransactionID, Date, Time, CustomerID, CardID, GasStationID, ProductID, Amount, Price.

Table yearmonth contains columns: CustomerID, Date, Consumption. Foreign keys: yearmonth.CustomerID references customers.None; yearmonth.CustomerID references customers.None.
Column CustomerID in table yearmonth stores integer data.
Column Date in table yearmonth stores text data.
